zh.Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯巴包
zh.Braine,02220,Aisne,Hauts-de-France,FRANC: 法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun於1220年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯巴包時，她的父親Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun25歲，母親Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun21歲。她於大約1253年與Robert de Dreux結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1259年11月1日在她的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯巴包

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clémence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun was born in 1220, in Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, was 25 and her mother, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, was 21. She married Robert de Dreux about 1253. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 1 November 1259, in her hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun est née en 1220, à Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Dreux environ 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1259, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Braine, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun 1220 in Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun 25 und ihre Mutter Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun 21. Sie hat um 1253 Robert de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. November 1259 im Alter von 39 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun è nata il nel 1220 nel Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Dreux circa 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 1 novembre 1259, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Braine, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudunが1220年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスバプアウメで生まれた時，父Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudunは25歳，母Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudunは21歳であった。約1253年にRobert de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1259年11月1日に故郷で39歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun(이)가 1220년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스 바파에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1253년 Robert de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1259년 11월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun nasceu em 1220, em Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Dreux aproximadamente 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1259, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Braine, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun родилась в 1220 г. в местности бапаюм, аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Dreux около 1253 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 ноября 1259 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности бреаин, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun nació en 1220, en Bapaume, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Clémence des Roches, Viscountess de Chateaudun, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert de Dreux aproximadamente 1253. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1259, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Braine, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
